steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What letter comes after G in the song?
Which letter is like a snake and is said after M?
What letter do you see at the end of 'Zebra'?

steps.title: Anna's Picnic
steps.text: Hello! I am Anna. I like apples. I have ten red apples in my bag. The sun is big and bright.

steps.audio_text: Hello! My name is Tom. I have two red apples and a green kite. Do you like playing outside?

questions.question: How many apples does Tom have?

steps.prompt: Say: I have a red apple.

questions.question_text: I ___ a teacher. (Grammar question)
Which image shows 'apple'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Hi' is not a greeting.
What number comes after five?
Fill in the blanks: I have a book __ the table.

lessons.title: My Family & My Body
lessons.topic: Family, Body Parts, and Personal Descriptions

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Who is 👨 in the family video?
questions.hint: He is your dad and lives in your home.

questions.question_text: Which body part helps you see?
questions.hint: You use them to watch TV.

questions.question_text: Who is the youngest family member?

steps.title: My Family
steps.text: This is my family. I have a brother. His name is Max. Max has a big smile and short hair. He likes to play in the park with me.

questions.question: What does Max like to do?

steps.audio_text: My sister is really kind. She has curly black hair and wears glasses. She loves to read books in the afternoon.

questions.question: Does she love to read books?

steps.prompt: Say: 'I have a nose and two ears.'
steps.expected_text: i have a nose and two ears

questions.question_text: I ___ tall. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'father'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Nose' is a body part.
Where is the ball? It is ___ the box. (Reading comprehension)

lessons.title: Animals & School Review
lessons.topic: Farm/Pets, School Bag, Colors, and Emotions

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal says 'Oink' in the video?
questions.hint: This animal loves to roll in the mud.

questions.question_text: Which animal from the video can fly?
questions.hint: This is a bird that swims too.

questions.question_text: Which animal makes a 'Baa' sound?

steps.title: Fun on the Farm
steps.text: I am on the farm. I see a brown horse and a yellow chicken. I have a blue school bag. There is an orange in my bag. I like the big red barn!

questions.question: What is in the school bag?

steps.audio_text: Today, I visited a big farm. I saw three happy ducks swimming in the pond. The ducks like to play in the water.

questions.question: How many ducks are swimming in the pond?
Do the ducks like to play in the water?

steps.prompt: Say: What animal do you like? (Use 'I like ...')

questions.question_text: I ___ a blue pen in my bag. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'cat'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: Cows can fly.
Select the correct sentence: The fish is ____ the bowl.
Mary is feeling happy. She is ____.

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What is the boy carrying?
questions.hint: He needs it to open something.

questions.question_text: Where is the boy standing?
questions.hint: He is about to enter somewhere.

questions.question_text: What does the boy want to do?
questions.hint: He needs to use the key for this.

steps.title: Mia's Day
steps.text: Hi! I am Mia. I have a big yellow ball. I like to play in the park. My ball is on the grass. I have a friend. His name is Tom. We are happy!

questions.question: What is the color of Mia's ball?
Where does Mia like to play?

steps.audio_text: Hi! My name is Lily. I have a big brown dog. He loves to play with my red ball in the park.

questions.question: Does the dog like the ball?

steps.prompt: Say: Tell me your name, how you feel today, and what toy you like.
steps.expected_text: hello my name is emma i am excited i like my teddy bear

questions.question_text: Where is the cat? It is __ the box. (Grammar question)
Which item is a fruit? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: You say 'Goodbye' when you leave.
What does Ben like to do? Ben likes to play ___. (Reading comprehension question)
